text:
To calculate the total time Britany spends on TikTok in a month with four weeks, we need to consider the time she spends on each activity and sum them up.

1. **Video Recording Time:**
   - Britany records 18 4-minute videos each week.
   - Weekly video recording time: \( 18 \text{ videos/week} \times 4 \text{ minutes/video} = 72 \text{ minutes/week} \).
   - Monthly video recording time: \( 72 \text{ minutes/week} \times 4 \text{ weeks/month} = 288 \text{ minutes/month} \).

2. **Song Writing Time:**
   - Britany spends 2 hours each week writing amateur songs.
   - Weekly song writing time: \( 2 \text{ hours/week} \) (Note: 2 hours is equivalent to 120 minutes).
   - Monthly song writing time: \( 120 \text{ minutes/week} \times 4 \text{ weeks/month} = 480 \text{ minutes/month} \).

3. **Makeup Time:**
   - Britany spends 15 minutes six days a week doing her makeup.
   - Weekly makeup time: \( 15 \text{ minutes/day} \times 6 \text{ days/week} = 90 \text{ minutes/week} \).
   - Monthly makeup time: \( 90 \text{ minutes/week} \times 4 \text{ weeks/month} = 360 \text{ minutes/month} \).

Now, sum up all the monthly times:
- Total time spent on TikTok in a month: \( 288 \text{ minutes} + 480 \text{ minutes} + 360 \text{ minutes} = 1128 \text{ minutes} \).

To convert this total time into hours:
- \( 1128 \text{ minutes} \div 60 = 18.8 \text{ hours} \).

Therefore, Britany spends a total of 18.8 hours on TikTok in a month with four weeks.
